items.title: Human Dignity as the Highest Value: An Analytical Study of the Encyclical Magnifica Humanitas and Its Operationalization in the Ajir Legal Framework
items.summary: A note on human dignity, the Encyclical Magnifica Humanitas, and how Ajir Research Labs translates those principles into its legal and AI disclosure framework.

items.title: Algorithmic Abdication and Intellectual Atrophy in the Era of Generative AI
items.summary: A literature review on cognitive offloading, intellectual atrophy, and the governance strategies needed to preserve human agency in AI-assisted work.

items.title: The Digital Funnel: Revealing the Techniques of Algorithmic Radicalization
items.summary: An analysis of how recommendation systems, engagement optimization, and filter bubbles can steer users toward extremist belief environments.

items.title: Epistemic Passivity
items.summary: A review of how generative AI can weaken active knowledge formation when users treat machine output as an oracle instead of a tool for inquiry.

items.title: Intellectual Abdication Effect of AI and Internet and Its Role in the Erosion of Intelligence and the Rise of Algorithmic Radicalization
items.summary: A synthesis of research connecting cognitive offloading, distributed atrophy, and the increased susceptibility created by algorithmic manipulation.
